name: Azure Login Bypassing Conditional Access Policies
notes: Detects a successful login to the Microsoft Intune Company Portal which could allow bypassing Conditional Access Policies and InTune device trust using a tool like TokenSmith.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft 365 Defender, Microsoft Office 365, Microsoft Azure Platform

when the event matches (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%userloggedin%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9ba1a5c7-f17a-4de9-a1f1-6178c8d51223%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%success%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cmsi:cmsi%') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0000000a-0000-0000-c000-000000000000%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Azure Login Bypassing Conditional Access Policies on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft 365 Defender, Microsoft Office 365, Microsoft Azure Platform

AND when the event matches (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%userloggedin%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%9ba1a5c7-f17a-4de9-a1f1-6178c8d51223%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%success%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cmsi:cmsi%') AND (NOT(LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0000000a-0000-0000-c000-000000000000%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Azure Login Bypassing Conditional Access Policies

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Josh Nickels, Marius Rothenbücher SIGMA Title: Azure Login Bypassing Conditional Access Policies SIGMA Description: Detects a successful login to the Microsoft Intune Company Portal which could allow bypassing Conditional Access Policies and InTune device trust using a tool like TokenSmith.   False positives: - Unknown  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
